## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `refactor:`, ...)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (added/updated tests where it makes sense)
- [ ] Relevant README(s) updated if the public interface or setup changed
